summary: Backend performance optimization tests completed - All 24 tests PASSED. Verified all API endpoints continue to work correctly after performance optimizations: SimpleCache, asyncio.gather parallel queries, N+1 batch query fixes, and GZip compression.

asyncio.gather used correctly in 7 locations for parallel DB queries
N+1 query fixes properly implemented with batch user loading using users_cache pattern
GZip compression active via GZipMiddleware (verified via Content-Encoding: gzip header)
